title: Regulatory Activity
description: Structured representation of a single activity/criterion set under a sustainable finance framework. Every framework parsed into the Perennity regulatory knowledge base must satisfy this schema. Designed for primary-source traceability and methodology-version auditability.

framework_version.description: Canonical version identifier of the framework instrument. Example: Regulation_2021_2139_consolidated_2024

framework_source_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical source document the data was parsed from. Bump this when the underlying regulation changes.

activity_code.description: Framework-native activity code. Example: 8.1 for EU Taxonomy data processing.

nace_codes.description: NACE Rev. 2 codes mapped to this activity, where applicable.

methodology_version.description: Perennity methodology version this activity definition is bound to. Example: v3.2

methodology_vintage.description: Human-readable vintage of the methodology version. Example: May 2026.

effective_date.description: Date from which this activity definition is in force for new reports.

supersedes.description: id of a prior activity definition this one replaces (for change-log traceability).

methodology_criteria.description: Perennity Bridge benchmarking criteria (authority_level 2). Render only on the paid report; never contribute to alignment verdict.

safeguards_criteria.description: Minimum-safeguards criteria per Regulation (EU) 2020/852 Article 18. Currently attached under Activity 8.1; will move to framework-level once SFDR / EuGBS frameworks land. TODO: hoist when multi-framework KB lands.

minimum_safeguards.description: Legacy declarative-only safeguards summary; superseded by safeguards_criteria from v3.2 onward. Retained for schema-compat on prior fixtures.

criterion.description: Short canonical name for the criterion.

source_reference.description: Anchor inside the regulation. Example: Annex_I_Section_8.1_paragraph_2

source_text.description: Verbatim regulation text for this criterion. Pulled directly into the paid report as the authoritative quote.

conditional_on.description: Trigger that activates this criterion. Example: water_stressed_region

estimation_allowed.description: Whether the EU Platform Feb 2025 estimation guidance applies.

narrative_template_refs.description: References into the DNSH/SC narrative library.

scoring_logic_ref.description: Reference into versioned scoring code. Example: logic.sc_8_1_2.v1

authority_level.description: 1 = regulatory attestation; 2 = Perennity Bridge methodology; 3 = informational. Drives renderer routing and heatmap aggregation.

authority_source.description: Free-text citation for the authority backing this criterion.

calibration_references.description: External datasets / surveys used to calibrate the bands for a benchmarking criterion.

snapshot_inclusion.description: If false, the criterion never appears in the free snapshot output (independent of authority_level).

depends_on.description: Criterion ids that must be scored before this one. The engine resolves dependencies and passes prior results in context.

framework_applicability.description: Which frameworks treat this criterion as applicable. Example: [eu_taxonomy_aligned, sfdr_article_9, eu_gbs].

render_paths.description: Renderer paths where this criterion may appear. Defaults to both when omitted.

data_points_required.description: Flat list of data_points keys expected on ProjectInput.data_points. Used by intake form generation.

measurement_standard.description: Reference to an external measurement standard. Example: EN_50600-4-2
